Bash(SUPABASE_URL="https://ffgdjkxsqkexiwrnhkpt.supabase.co"
SUPABASE_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImZmZ2Rqa3hzcWtleGl3cm5oa3B0Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzAzOTAzNTAsImV4cCI6MjA4NTk2NjM1MH0.DW52C3jUeWnpESTLg8FJUa0N0_bPYqJDm_x4Vkta9xw"

echo "=== CHANTIERS ==="
curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/chantiers?select=*&order=created_at" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_KEY}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}" | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== LOTS \(count\) ==="
curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/lots?select=id" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_KEY}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}" \\
  -H "Prefer: count=exact" \\
  -H "Range: 0-0" -I 2>&1 | grep -i content-range

echo ""
echo "=== LIVRAISONS ==="
curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/livraisons?select=id,fournisseur,statut,created_at&order=created_at" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_KEY}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}" | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== BESOINS ==="
curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/besoins?select=id,designation,chantier_id,created_at&order=created_at" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_KEY}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}" | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== NOTES ==="
curl -s "${SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/notes?select=id,contenu,created_at&order=created_at" \\
  -H "apikey: ${SUPABASE_KEY}" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_KEY}" | python3 -m json.tool)
